data.title: The Organic Food People | Forest Whole Foods
data.metaDescription: Forest Whole foods offer one of the finest ranges of organic foods, snacks and groceries that are healthy, affordable.
data.ogDescription: Forest Whole foods offer one of the finest ranges of organic foods, snacks and groceries that are healthy, affordable.

issues.impact: You're leaving valuable persuasion space unused.
issues.fix: Expand to 150-160 characters. Sell the click!

issues.impact: Your links look terrible when shared on Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook. Broken thumbnail = low click rates.
issues.fix: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url to every page

issues.impact: Invisible to screen readers and search engines. You're losing Google Images traffic.
issues.fix: Add descriptive alt text to every image. Be specific, include keywords where natural.

issues.impact: Slow load times = higher bounce rates. Mobile users are leaving before your page loads.
issues.fix: Compress images, minify CSS/JS, enable gzip compression. Target under 500KB.

summary: We analyzed www.forestwholefoods.co.uk and found 4 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
